user.title: Connect to Foodsharing.de
user.description: Select the location on the map to search for baskets within the selected radius. Your email address and password will be used to authenticate with the API.

totp.title: Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)
totp.description: Your account has Two-Factor Authentication enabled. Please enter the matching 6-digit TOTP code from your authenticator app (e.g., Google Authenticator, Authy or your Foodsharing App).

add_location.title: Additional Locations
add_location.description: You can monitor multiple locations. Would you like to add another location?

extra_location.title: Add Location
extra_location.description: Select an additional location on the map.

error.invalid_totp: The TOTP code entered is incorrect or expired. Please try again.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the server, please check your network and try again.

abort.already_configured: This Foodsharing account is already configured.

init.title: Configure Foodsharing Options
init.description: Change the options for the Foodsharing integration.

manage_locations.title: Manage Locations
manage_locations.description: You currently have {count} location(s) configured. Would you like to add another?

extra_location_option.title: Add Location
extra_location_option.description: Select an additional location on the map.

error.invalid_totp: The TOTP code entered is incorrect or expired.

auth_failed.title: Foodsharing authentication failed for {email}
auth_failed.description: Your Foodsharing credentials for {email} are no longer valid. Please update your email and password in the integration configuration.

api_offline.title: Foodsharing API is offline
api_offline.description: The Foodsharing.de API returned a 503 error. The service may be temporarily unavailable. Data will update automatically once the API is back online.
